name: Monday.com

composio_registry_match.name: Monday
composio_registry_match.description: monday.com is a customizable work management platform for project planning, collaboration, and automation, supporting agile, sales, marketing, and more

description: A collaborative work operating system that enables project management, workflow automation, and the integration of AI agents as first-class team members.
notes: Monday.com provides an extensive GraphQL API and explicit support for MCP (Model Context Protocol), making it highly suitable for agentic tool use.
